text:
Kyu (キュウ, Kyū) is examinee #105 in the 287th Hunter Exam. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 3, Chapter 23 He is also an examinee in the 288th Hunter Exam. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 148 

Appearance

 
|-|2011 Anime=
 
Kyu 2011 Design.png|Kyu's 2011 anime adaptation design
 
|-|1999 Anime=
 
Kyu fullbody HXH 99 EP21.png|Full body image of Kyu
 
 

Kyu has short red hair, small eyes, and a distinctive mashed-in red nose. During the Hunter Exam, he wore a turtle-necked purple shirt with long sleeves, brown trousers, and gray shoes. He also carried a light brown satchel and a saber with the hilt wrapped in bandages.

Personality

Not much is known about Kyu's personality, but, before he was attacked by Pokkle, he seemed to be anxious and aware that he was being targeted; when Pokkle revealed himself he acted rather confident that he'd win against him. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 3, Chapter 24 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

Kyu is one of the 24 examinees to make it to the 4th Phase of the Hunter Exam on Zevil Island. His badge is the designated target of Pokkle, who paralyzes him with one of his poisoned arrows and then takes the badge. Seeing him lying helpless on the ground, Gon bandages him and moves him to a place where he can wait safely until the effects of the poison disappear. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 3, Chapter 25 

Greed Island arc

Kyu partakes in the 288th Hunter Exam. During the First Phase, he is knocked out by Killua and gets his badge taken, thus failing the exam. 

Manga Appearances

Battles

Trivia

Kyu shares his Japanese voice actors from both adaptations with two different characters; Yoshikazu Nagano with Chrollo Lucilfer in the 1999 anime adaptation, and Daisuke Namikawa with Hisoka Morow in the 2011 anime adaptation.

Anime and Manga Differences

In the Bonus Phase of the exam of the 1999 anime adaptation, Ryu was shown to be an explosive expert by setting the explosives to explode the rocks surrounding the ship. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 20 (1999)
